page_content:
EDHD421 Developmental Perspectives on Peer Interactions, Relationships, and Groups (3 Credits)

Explores the historical and theoretical foundations of contemporary research on peer interactions, relationships, and groups. It examines

the interplay between individual characteristics, social behaviors, and relationships, and familial and extra-familial factors with an emphasis on diversity in the peer experience across various cultural, ethnic, gender, ability, and socioeconomic contexts.

Recommended: EDHD411 and EDHD306.
